title: SigNoz/signoz
friendlyTitle: SigNoz helps teams see what AI agents are doing in production
summary: SigNoz is an open-source, OpenTelemetry-native observability platform that brings application traces, metrics and logs together and now explicitly supports monitoring AI-agent workloads. The mature project has about 30,700 stars and was one of the strongest AI-related repositories in today’s Trending collection.
friendlySummary: SigNoz is a popular open-source monitoring platform for logs, performance data and request traces. It can also help teams follow AI agents across models, tools and services.
whyItMatters: Use SigNoz to trace an agent request across model calls, tools and services while correlating failures with infrastructure data. It is useful when a prototype becomes a production workflow and teams need latency, error and cost evidence rather than chat transcripts alone.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Use it when an agent becomes part of a real service. It can help you find slow steps, errors and system problems instead of guessing from the final answer.
